description_long: This is a simple, utilitarian wooden stool with three flat, rectangular shelves supported by two thick, vertical side panels. The shelves are slightly uneven, giving the stool a hand-crafted or rustic appearance. The top and bottom edges of the side panels are straight, while the inner edges are subtly angled, adding a touch of visual interest. The stool is entirely open on the front and back, allowing easy access to the shelves. The wood surface appears unpainted and matte, with a muted brown color and no visible decorative elements. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, suitable for use in urban environments such as parks, sidewalks, or garages.
description: A rustic, brown wooden stool with three open shelves and thick side supports, featuring a simple, hand-crafted look.
description_view_0: Side view showing the solid, flat side panel with subtle top notches and no visible shelves.
description_view_1: Front view displaying three open shelves framed by thick side panels, with the shelves slightly uneven.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0 with a solid side panel and no visible shelves.
description_view_3: Back view similar to the front, showing the three open shelves and side supports.
